results.title: Revised Kimball Library budget up for vote in Randolph
results.description: Randolph residents face urgent vote on Kimball Library budget. Rejection could lead to library closure. 8% tax increase proposed.

results.title: IMF chief economist says Fed reduction in rate guidance is 'entirely appropriate'
HDFC Bank review finds no basis for concerns flagged in Atanu Chakraborty’s resignation
results.description: According to the statement included in the bank’s filing, “The legal review was conducted over a three-month period and involved the review of thousands of documents and interviews of the Independent Directors and several members of senior management.”

results.title: Middlemen offer discounted Iranian oil to Indian refiners after US waiver
results.description: National Iranian Oil Company and traders have approached Indian refiners with discounted crude following Washington's temporary sanctions waiver, though payment mechanisms remain unclear

results.title: How long do debt collectors have to collect from an estate?
results.description: Debt collectors have a limited time to make claims against an estate, so it's important to know that firm deadline.
